calendar.matters:
Respondents' Demurrer To The Petition (Per 9-24-19 Ex Parte Order)
Off Calendar Oct-11-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jenica D. Maldonado, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, T:415.554.4661, for respondent/moving party;
Michael F. Denny, T:415.608.0269, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf.

RULING: The tentative ruling was contested and argued. At the conclusion of arguments, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on RESPONDENTS' DEMURRER TO THE PETITION, as follows:

Respondent and real parties' demurrer to Petitioner Michael Denny's petition for writ of mandate is sustained without leave to amend.

Order signed in open court. (See word minutes and scanned order for the Court's full ruling.)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

PETITIONER MICHAEL DENNY's Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Remove Proposition A From The November Election Ballot.
